data.description: Miata Metals grants stock options to employees, enhancing company benefits and performance.

data.title: Think Together and AT&T Expand Digital Learning Opportunities for Lynwood Students Through The Achievery
data.description: A collaboration between AT&T and Think Together has resulted in a $525,000 investment to bring The Achievery program to afterschool students in Lynwood, California. The program aims to help students develop digital skills and better prepare for their future. This partnership marks a significant step in promoting educational opportunities for youth in the community. The initiative was celebrated on March 27, 2026.

data.title: Notice of Data Privacy Incident
data.description: In Westbrook, Maine on March 27, 2026, Woodfords Family Services released a statement emphasizing their dedication to safeguarding personal data. They disclosed a recent data breach affecting the security of individuals' information. This incident underscores the organization's vigilance in protecting personal details.

data.title: Veteran Journalist Paul Chaderjian Reveals War Torn Past in Powerful Debut Novel "Letters to Barbra"
data.description: Veteran journalist Paul Chaderjian, known for his three decades of reporting from global front lines, has taken a new direction by releasing his debut novel, Letters to Barbra. The novel delves into the themes of war, exile, and the quest for identity, reflecting Chaderjian's personal journey. The book, which is a departure from his previous works, offers a unique perspective on these complex issues. Chaderjian's transition from journalism to fiction has been highly anticipated, with many eager to see how his experiences shape this new venture. The novel is set to be released by ABC News, marking a significant milestone in Chaderjian's career.
TERAGO Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results

data.title: TechnipFMC Defies Market, Hits Record High, Leads 16 Top Performers To IBD Best Stock Lists
data.description: Today, several top growth stocks, including TechnipFMC, have been newly included in the IBD stock lists such as the IBD 50, IPO Leaders, and IBD Big Cap 20. TechnipFMC defied the market trends, reaching a record high and leading a group of 16 top performers on the IBD Best Stock Lists. This showcases the resilience and potential of these selected stocks in the current market conditions.
US Official: Iran missile strike on base in Saudi Arabia injures 12 US troops, two seriously.

data.title: Quantum Biopharma Provides Corporate Update
data.description: This press release is meant for distribution within Canada only and should not be distributed to United States newswire services or disseminated in the United States.

data.title: PGI Expands Its Portfolio and Global Reach Through Acquisition of Key IP Assets
data.description: Premium Guard Inc. (PGI), a renowned filter manufacturer and supplier established in 1996, unveiled the acquisition of vital patents and intellectual property from First Brands Group covering various product segments. The deal was disclosed on March 27, 2026, in Memphis, Tennessee. The acquisition consolidates PGI's position in the market and strengthens its portfolio across different categories.

data.title: Fermi America™ Files Second Clean Air Permit Application with TCEQ for 5 GW of Additional Power for Its Project Matador Private Grid
data.description: On February 25, 2025, Fermi America was granted the first-ever clean air permit by TCEQ for approximately 6 gigawatts of power generation. Fulfilling their promise, Fermi America submitted a new application for an additional 5 gigawatts shortly after receiving approval for the initial 6 gigawatts. The site has the potential to encompass 11 gigawatts of clean natural gas, along with 4.4 gigawatts from a mix of nuclear, solar, and battery power sources. With a grand total of 17 gigawatts, the campus is aiming for significant power generation capabilities.

data.title: Constellation Software Inc. Announces Mark Leonard’s Decision to not Stand for Re-Election to Board of Directors
data.description: On March 27, 2026, Constellation Software Inc. revealed that Mark Leonard, the founder and ex-President of Constellation, will not seek re-election to the Board of Directors. His tenure will end after the annual shareholder meeting on May 15, 2026. Leonard's decision affects Constellation (TSX:CSU) and the upcoming board composition.

data.title: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. Announces Director Nominees for Upcoming Shareholder Meeting
data.description: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. based in Thousand Oaks, California, (known as Kolibri) (TSX: KEI, NASDAQ: KGEI) recently revealed that their board of directors has chosen to nominate the candidates suggested by Tetragon Partners UK LLP for election to the Board at the upcoming annual general meeting on May 4, 2026. This decision comes after a thorough evaluation process and signifies a strategic move for the future of the Company.

data.title: Fusion Fuel Highlights Royal Uranium’s 2% NSR on Two Mineral Claims held by the Shea Creek Joint Venture, One of Canada’s Largest Undeveloped Uranium Projects in the Athabasca Basin
data.description: Dublin, 27th March 2026 - Fusion Fuel Green PLC (Nasdaq: HTOO) shared details about a 2.0% Net Smelter Return (NSR) royalty on two specific mineral claims, MC00040006 and MC0004007, belonging to the Shea Creek Joint Venture. Fusion Fuel, a top provider of energy engineering and utility solutions, expects to secure these royalty rights alongside others through its agreement with Royal Uranium Inc. The acquisition is part of a larger set of mineral claims maintained by the Shea Creek Joint Venture.

data.title: HYTN Successfully Releases Cannabis Products in Germany and Accepts Reorder
data.description: A pharmaceutical manufacturer called HYTN Innovations Inc. operating in Vancouver, British Columbia, shared a notable update today. The company, listed as CSE: HYTN, FSE: 85W0, OTC PINK: HYTNF, focuses on producing items with psychoactive and psychotropic components, notably cannabis. They recently made an announcement that their batch of wholesale cannabis products, which had been sent to Germany in the previous quarter, has now been cleared for sale in the German market. This move is significant for HYTN as it opens up a new market for their products and could potentially boost their revenue.

data.title: SkinCure Oncology Files Suit Against American College of Mohs Surgery
data.description: In Burr Ridge, Illinois, on March 27, 2026, SkinCure Oncology, a prominent provider of cancer treatment services, introduced a state-of-the-art cancer center model specializing in Image-Guided Superficial Radiation Therapy (IGSRT) for nonmelanoma skin cancer (NMSC) treatment. This model marks a significant advancement in cancer care, aiming to enhance the efficacy and accessibility of treatment for patients.

data.title: EPIQ SOLUTIONS RELOCATING MARYLAND MANUFACTURING DIVISION AND 90 EMPLOYEES TO ARCADIA BUSINESS PARK IN FREDERICK
data.description: EPIQ Solutions, a company based in Chicago and operating three divisions in North America, has signed a lease for 36,120 square feet with St. John Properties in Frederick, Maryland. The agreement was finalized on March 27, 2026.

data.title: Dow Jones Dives, Oil Prices At $100 As Iran War Drags On; Tesla Looms
data.description: Stock markets experienced a significant decline with major indexes hitting their lowest points in six months, coinciding with oil prices nearing $100 due to ongoing tensions related to the Iran war. Additionally, investors are awaiting the delivery updates from Tesla. The Dow Jones saw a sharp drop as global uncertainties persist. This development reflects the impact of geopolitical events on financial markets, with oil prices playing a significant role in the current economic landscape.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Enters Correction As Oil Jumps; Micron Rises (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following President Trump's decision to extend the deadline for Iran negotiations. Oil prices saw a surge amidst this news. This led to the Dow entering a correction phase. In addition, Micron stock rose during the trading session. The market's volatility and fluctuations were closely monitored live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Governor of California issues order banning insider trading in prediction markets amid increasing legal actions in the US.
data.description: The most recent executive order in the United States is part of a series of legal measures aimed at reducing government insider trading on predictive markets. This order comes amidst a growing trend of similar actions, reflecting efforts to tackle this issue in the country.
